message:
chore: update .gitignore for test artifacts + sync Cargo.lock for tru rename

Add ignores for storage.sqlite3, test-logs/, and migration_baseline.
Sync Cargo.lock with toon_rust -> tru v0.2.0 crate rename from prior commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,6 +52,10 @@ claude-upgrade-progress.json
 # Shell command artifacts (from malformed redirects like `> =`)
 =
 
+# Local scratch SQLite DBs (never tracked)
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
 # Local Cargo and Rustup caches (agent workspace artifacts)
 .cargo/
 .rustup/

@@ -309,9 +309,9 @@ dependencies = [
  "sha2",
  "tempfile",
  "thiserror",
- "toon_rust",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
+ "tru",
  "unicode-width",
  "vergen-gix",
  "walkdir",
@@ -4556,23 +4556,6 @@ dependencies = [
  "tokio",
 ]
 
-[[package]]
-name = "toon_rust"
-version = "0.1.1"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust.git?rev=788589d#788589d7b11a8bf2c88e364befe63d87eb890eba"
-dependencies = [
- "anyhow",
- "chrono",
- "clap",
- "clap_complete",
- "serde",
- "serde_json",
- "thiserror",
- "tracing",
- "tracing-subscriber",
- "vergen-gix",
-]
-
 [[package]]
 name = "tower"
 version = "0.5.3"
@@ -4692,6 +4675,24 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing-serde",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "tru"
+version = "0.2.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "008cb2edaa98e6a72a7e31d0640c54018cf688869fe40f1c39df392cbc421e73"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",
+ "chrono",
+ "clap",
+ "clap_complete",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "thiserror",
+ "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
+ "vergen-gix",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "try-lock"
 version = "0.2.5"
